(M0900) Other Reason Admitted to Nursing Home Reason(s) for admission to nursing home: other. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, Space = Unknown. CHAR 1 x x
M0900_NH_PERMANENT (M0900) Permanent Placement Reason(s) for admission to nursing home: permanent placement. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, Space = Unknown. CHAR 1 x x
M0900_NH_RESPITE (M0900) Respite Care Reason(s) for admission to nursing home: respite care. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, Space = Unknown. CHAR 1 x x
